name: Hyperscaler - Full Autonomous Branding Factory v5.1 FIXED PIPELINE

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  "contents": [
    {
      "parts": [
        {
          "text": `You are the Lead Editor for HYPERSCALER. Analyze this news item from Reddit/Web.

Title: ${$json.title}
Content: ${$json.text}
Score: ${$json.original_score}
URL: ${$json.source_url}

TASK 1: Curation
Determine if this is highly relevant to Agentic AI (Agents, LLM Workflows, Autonomy, Tool-use Frameworks, etc.).

TASK 2: Real News Headline Generation
Write a headline exactly like a real tech news editor would write it. The headline must tell the full story at a glance — who did what, and what makes it notable.

GOOD EXAMPLES:
- "French Engineers Develop a Highly Stable Omnidirectional Drone That Reaches 124 mph"
- "Anthropic Is Now Offering Free AI Courses With Certificates at Zero Cost"
- "OpenAI Launches SearchGPT to Directly Challenge Google Search"
- "Meta Releases Open-Source AI Model That Outperforms GPT-4 on Key Benchmarks"

BAD EXAMPLES (do NOT do this):
- "OPENAI RELEASES SEARCHGPT" (too vague, no detail)
- "AI DRONE SYSTEM" (not a sentence, tells nothing)
- "REVOLUTIONARY AI BREAKTHROUGH" (fluff, meaningless)

RULES FOR HEADLINES:
- Format: Title Case (capitalize main words), NOT all caps.
- Length: 10 to 18 words — long enough to be specific, short enough to be punchy.
- Must include: WHO (company/person/team), WHAT they did, and WHY it matters or WHAT makes it notable (a number, a price, a comparison, a specific feature).
- Factual: Must be 100% grounded in the source content — do not invent or exaggerate.
- Plain English: No fluff words like Amazing, Revolutionary, Game-changing, Groundbreaking, Industry-leading.
- Clarity: A reader must understand the full story from the headline alone, with zero additional context.

RULES FOR HIGHLIGHTS:
- Select 5 to 8 of the most impactful individual WORDS from the headline to highlight in Cyan #00D4FF.
- WHAT TO HIGHLIGHT: Proper nouns (person names, company names, product names), numbers/amounts ($100M, GPT-5, 124mph), key technical terms (GPU, AGI, LLM, API), strong action verbs (Warns, Beats, Builds, Outperforms, Bans, Cuts, Surpasses), key adjectives (Compact, Open-Source, Free, Fastest), and any notable descriptor from the headline.
- Each entry in headline_highlights must be a SINGLE WORD exactly as it appears in the headline (e.g. "SAM", "ALTMAN", "GPT-5", "ANTHROPIC", "$2B").
- If a name has two words (Sam Altman), include BOTH separately: ["SAM", "ALTMAN"].
- DO NOT highlight: prepositions (For, In, With, On, At, To, By, From), articles (A, An, The), conjunctions (And, Or, But, That, Which), filler words (Now, Just, Also, Only, More).
- GOOD: headline "Sam Altman Launches GPT-5 That Beats Claude for $20" → ["SAM", "ALTMAN", "GPT-5", "CLAUDE", "$20"]
- BAD: ["LAUNCHES", "THAT", "FOR"] — never highlight verbs or prepositions.

RULES FOR CONTENT:
- summary: 1-2 sentence professional overview.
- full_article: 3-4 paragraph technical analysis.
- image_prompt: Describe a SCENE that visually tells the news story — like a movie still or editorial photo. Think: what is the most compelling visual moment from this news? SCENE EXAMPLES by news type:
- AI model launch → person reacting with wide-eyed excitement staring at a glowing laptop screen showing the AI interface
- Hacking/security → dark hooded figure hunched over multiple monitors filled with scrolling code
- GPU/hardware launch → engineer or CEO holding the physical chip/GPU card up, clean studio background
- Research paper → scientist at whiteboard covered in diagrams, lab environment
- Funding/deal → handshake in a modern glass office, city skyline behind
- Country policy → official at a podium or government building exterior
- Robot/automation → robot arm or humanoid robot in a factory or lab setting
Scene must have: a clear subject (person or object), meaningful background context, natural props related to the story. Cinestill 800t film style. No floating text labels or captions. Natural screen/console content (blurred code, terminal output) is fine. Company logo may appear naturally on products, screens, or walls. Purely visual storytelling.
- image_search_query: A precise search query to find a REAL press photo of the specific person or subject. RULES: Always include the person's full name if known (e.g. 'Sam Altman OpenAI CEO portrait'). For persons: '[Full Name] [title/company] press photo portrait'. For companies: '[Company Name] [CEO full name] interview'. For products/tech: '[product name] real photo hands-on'. For countries: '[Country] [specific event or topic] news photo'. NEVER use generic terms like 'AI technology' or 'artificial intelligence concept' — always be name-specific.
- linkedin: Professional post text.
- facebook: Casual post text.
- is_agentic_relevant: boolean.
- confidence: 1-10.

\\n\\nRULES FOR SUBJECT IDENTIFICATION:\\n- subject_type: \"person\" if about a specific individual; \"company\" if about an organization, brand, model, or product; \"country\" if about a nation or government.\\n- subject_name: The PRIMARY brand/entity name. For persons → their COMPANY name (e.g., Sam Altman → \"Anthropic\"). For companies/models → the company (e.g., GPT-5 → \"OpenAI\", Claude → \"Anthropic\", Gemini → \"Google\"). For frameworks → the framework (e.g., \"LangChain\", \"NVIDIA\"). For countries → country name.\\n- company_domain: The official website domain of the primary company/brand (e.g. \"microsoft.com\", \"anthropic.com\", \"openai.com\", \"nvidia.com\", \"google.com\", \"meta.com\"). For countries use empty string.\\n- logo_search_query: ALWAYS required — every news item has a brand. Rules:\\n  • AI model (GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama): \"[creator company] logo transparent PNG\" (e.g. \"OpenAI logo PNG transparent\")\\n  • Company or startup: \"[company name] logo transparent PNG white background\"\\n  • Person (CEO, researcher): \"[their company name] logo transparent PNG\"\\n  • AI framework (LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen): \"[framework name] logo transparent PNG\"\\n  • Hardware/chip (NVIDIA GPU, Apple Silicon): \"[brand name] logo transparent PNG\"\\n  • Country or government: \"[country name] flag PNG\" or \"[country name] map silhouette\"\\n  • Generic AI news: \"artificial intelligence logo PNG\"\\n\\nReturn ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "is_agentic_relevant": true,
  "headline": "...",
  "headline_highlights": [...],
  "summary": "...",
  "full_article": "...",
  "image_prompt": "...",
  "image_search_query": "...",
  "linkedin": "...",
  "facebook": "...",
  "source_url": "${$json.source_url}",
  "subreddit": "${$json.subreddit}",
  "reddit_url": "${$json.reddit_url}",
  "date": "${$json.date}",
  "row_number": ${$json.row_number},
  "confidence": 8
}`
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "generationConfig": {
    "maxOutputTokens": 4096,
    "temperature": 0.4
  }
}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const analysisData = $('Confidence Gate').item.json;
return [{ json: analysisData, binary: $input.item.binary }];
return [{ json: { FINAL_SUMMARY: { brand: 'HYPERSCALER', title: $input.item.json.headline, status: 'complete' } } }];
